calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Set For Trial On Mar-13-13 At 10:20 A.M. In Dept 504

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Continued To Mar-13-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Steven Bruce (415.931.2314) Appellant appearing in propria persona;
Michael Zararte of Last & Faoro (650.696.8350) appearing for Respondent Scepter Co.

This cause comes on regularly for hearing on appeal. Mr. Bruce is affirmed.

The issue of this appeal pertaining only to the denial of the motion to vacate judgment, or if this is a trial de novo is argued. The Court determines the only issue regarding today's hearing is the denial of the motion to vacate judgment.

The matter is argued. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Appellant's 1 - Certification of Records
Respondent's 20 - Plaintiff's Claim and Order to go to Small Claims Court

The Court denies Mr. Bruce's request for further briefing.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Claire Andrews of Behmke Reporting and Video Services, CSR #13509 (415.597.5600, depos@behmke.com)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-13-2013 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-18-2013 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-04-2013 Continued To Jan-18-13 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 506
